other_observers: Jim & Karen Schmoker, Peter Gent, Steve Mlodinow, Maggie Boswell.;
description: See photos. Small (basically American Goldfinch-sized) finch with bright red cap, yellow bill, variable side streaking, variable undertail covert and uppertail covert streaking/spotting. Males with variable pink wash on breast, sometimes extending to belly.Behaviors: Visiting thistle feeders with American Goldfinches and House FinchesCall: many call variations heardPlumage: winter
